allow: PowerShell($menu = Get-Content "src\\lib\\data\\menu.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "Version: $\($menu.version\)"; "Categories: $\($menu.categories.Count\)"; "Dishes: $\($menu.dishes.Count\)"; "Meta total_categories: $\($menu.metadata.total_categories\)"; "Meta total_dishes: $\($menu.metadata.total_dishes\)"; ""; "Dishes per category:"; $menu.dishes | Group-Object category_id | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" }; ""; "Unique dish IDs: $\(\($menu.dishes.id | Select-Object -Unique\).Count\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Mode, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; "---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Exclude "node_modules" | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch "node_modules|.svelte-kit|build" } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\($PWD.Path + "\\", ""\) } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(git add .editorconfig .gitignore .prettierrc .prettierignore CLAUDE.md LICENSE README.md package.json package-lock.json svelte.config.js tsconfig.json vite.config.ts docs src static .claude/settings.local.json)
